items.claim: Dioni Barbosa is a well-rounded fighter who is better than her 9-4 record suggests.
items.quote: I think Barbosa is a lot better than her record implies. I think she's very well-rounded.

items.claim: Anna Melisano's physicality and build have taken her further in her career than her actual skill set.
items.quote: Anna Melisano is one of these girls where her physicality and her build I feel like have taken her farther than her actual skill sets.

items.claim: Anna Melisano lacks accuracy in her striking.
items.quote: It's just she's not particularly accurate especially on the feet.

items.claim: Anna Melisano was dominated on the feet by Andrea Amaro despite having significant height and reach advantages.
items.quote: She's getting just absolutely do not dominated on the feet, but she's getting lit up.

items.claim: Anna Melisano possesses significant power in her elbows.
items.quote: To Anna Molasano's credit, she landed the elbows and they had enough power to where they busted her face open far enough to where the fight had to get called off.

items.claim: Dioni Barbosa is a superior striker compared to Anna Melisano.
items.quote: I feel like Dion Barbosa is the far more experienced and the far better overall striker.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: First up, this is a short notice step up for Anna Melisano.

items.claim: Dioni Barbosa has had a full training camp to prepare for this fight.
items.quote: Dionia Barbosa, she's had a full camp to prepare for this, so she should be in the far better shape overall.

items.claim: Anna Melisano was submitted in a fight against Cheyenne Bowers in 2023.
items.quote: I saw she was submitted once a couple years ago. What was it? 2023 Cheyenne Bowers.
